title: PLUDOS Edge Pipeline (warehouse1)
description: Edge data pipeline: shuttle drains, data quality, vibration signal, environment, Jetson power. Every panel honours the time picker and the $shuttle / $kind variables. No FL panels (that lives on the server System Monitor).

panels.title: Active Shuttles
panels.description: Distinct shuttle_id that drained in the selected time range.

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission" and r._field == "packets_total" and r.source == "drain") |> keep(columns: ["shuttle_id"]) |> group() |> distinct(column: "shuttle_id") |> count()

panels.title: Drains in Range
panels.description: Total drains (after $shuttle / $kind filter) in the selected range.

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission" and r._field == "packets_total" and r.source == "drain") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/ and r.kind =~ /${kind:regex}/) |> group() |> count()

panels.title: Missions
panels.description: Drains of kind=mission in range (ignores $kind).

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission" and r._field == "packets_total" and r.source == "drain" and r.kind == "mission") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/) |> group() |> count()

panels.title: Idle Snapshots
panels.description: Drains of kind=idle_snapshot in range (ignores $kind).

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission" and r._field == "packets_total" and r.source == "drain" and r.kind == "idle_snapshot") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/) |> group() |> count()

panels.title: Mean Loss %
panels.description: Average per-drain packet loss across the filtered drains in range.

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission" and r._field == "loss_pct" and r.source == "drain") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/ and r.kind =~ /${kind:regex}/) |> group() |> mean()

panels.title: Max Loss %
panels.description: Worst single-drain packet loss in range.

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission" and r._field == "loss_pct" and r.source == "drain") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/ and r.kind =~ /${kind:regex}/) |> group() |> max()

panels.title: Last Drain Age
panels.description: Time since the most recent filtered drain finished. Large value = no recent activity.

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission" and r._field == "packets_total" and r.source == "drain") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/ and r.kind =~ /${kind:regex}/) |> group() |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: float(v: int(v: now()) - int(v: r._time)) / 1000000000.0 }))

panels.title: Completeness %
panels.description: Share of filtered drains where every chunk arrived (complete==1).

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission" and r._field == "complete" and r.source == "drain") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/ and r.kind =~ /${kind:regex}/) |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if r._value then 1.0 else 0.0 })) |> group() |> mean() |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 100.0 }))

panels.title: Jetson Power Now (W)
panels.description: Live INA3221 board power = last input_current × last input_voltage over the past 5 min.

targets.query: cur = from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: -5m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "input_current" and r._field == "value" and r.ina_channel_label == "VDD_IN") |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "i_ma"}) volt = from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: -5m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "input_voltage" and r._field == "value" and r.ina_channel_label == "VDD_IN") |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "u_mv"}) join(tables: {c: cur, v: volt}, on: ["_time"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.i_ma * r.u_mv / 1000000.0})) |> last()

panels.title: Packet Loss % per Drain — by shuttle & kind
panels.description: Per-drain blast loss (Phase-1 fire-and-forget). Spikes = WiFi contention or weak link.

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission" and r._field == "loss_pct" and r.source == "drain") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/ and r.kind =~ /${kind:regex}/) |> group(columns: ["shuttle_id", "kind"]) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "shuttle_id", "kind"])

panels.title: Samples per Drain — accel & gyro by shuttle
panels.description: How many IMU samples each drain delivered. Low values = truncated capture or heavy loss.

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission" and (r._field == "accel_samples" or r._field == "gyro_samples") and r.source == "drain") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/ and r.kind =~ /${kind:regex}/) |> group(columns: ["shuttle_id", "_field"]) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "shuttle_id", "_field"])

panels.title: Recent Drains
panels.description: Most recent filtered drains in the selected range.

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission" and r.source == "drain") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/ and r.kind =~ /${kind:regex}/) |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "shuttle_id", "kind"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value") |> keep(columns: ["_time", "shuttle_id", "kind", "packets_received", "packets_total", "loss_pct", "accel_samples", "gyro_samples", "recv_duration_ms", "write_duration_ms", "complete"]) |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 200)

panels.title: Accel peak / rms per Drain — by shuttle
panels.description: Per-drain accelerometer intensity. Grouped by shuttle so it scales to the whole fleet.

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission" and (r._field == "accel_peak_g" or r._field == "accel_rms_g") and r.source == "drain") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/ and r.kind =~ /${kind:regex}/) |> group(columns: ["shuttle_id", "_field"]) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "shuttle_id", "_field"])

panels.title: Gyro peak per Drain — by shuttle
panels.description: Per-drain peak angular rate.

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission" and r._field == "gyro_peak_dps" and r.source == "drain") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/ and r.kind =~ /${kind:regex}/) |> group(columns: ["shuttle_id"]) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "shuttle_id"])

panels.title: Idle Waveform — accel (g) by shuttle
panels.description: Raw per-sample idle accel signature (ax/ay/az) from stm_idle_wave. Pick one shuttle in $shuttle for a clean trace.

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_idle_wave" and (r._field == "ax_g" or r._field == "ay_g" or r._field == "az_g")) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/) |> group(columns: ["shuttle_id", "_field"]) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "shuttle_id", "_field"])

panels.title: Idle Waveform — gyro (dps) by shuttle
panels.description: Raw per-sample idle gyro signature (gx/gy/gz) from stm_idle_wave.

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_idle_wave" and (r._field == "gx_dps" or r._field == "gy_dps" or r._field == "gz_dps")) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/) |> group(columns: ["shuttle_id", "_field"]) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "shuttle_id", "_field"])

panels.title: Mission Waveform — accel (g) by shuttle
panels.description: Per-mission vibration envelope (decimated ~50 Hz peak-per-bin from the full 3332/416 Hz capture; full rate stays in Parquet).

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission_wave" and (r._field == "ax_g" or r._field == "ay_g" or r._field == "az_g")) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/) |> group(columns: ["shuttle_id", "_field"]) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "shuttle_id", "_field"])

panels.title: Mission Waveform — gyro (dps) by shuttle
panels.description: Per-mission vibration envelope (decimated ~50 Hz peak-per-bin from the full 3332/416 Hz capture; full rate stays in Parquet).

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission_wave" and (r._field == "gx_dps" or r._field == "gy_dps" or r._field == "gz_dps")) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/) |> group(columns: ["shuttle_id", "_field"]) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "shuttle_id", "_field"])

from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission" and r._field == "temp_c" and r.source == "drain") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/ and r.kind =~ /${kind:regex}/) |> group(columns: ["shuttle_id"]) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "shuttle_id"])

from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission" and r._field == "pressure_hpa" and r.source == "drain") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/ and r.kind =~ /${kind:regex}/) |> group(columns: ["shuttle_id"]) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "shuttle_id"])

panels.title: Board Input Power (W)
panels.description: Power = input_current × input_voltage, joined per time window.

targets.query: cur = from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "input_current" and r._field == "value" and r.ina_channel_label == "VDD_IN") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "i_ma"}) volt = from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "input_voltage" and r._field == "value" and r.ina_channel_label == "VDD_IN") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "u_mv"}) join(tables: {c: cur, v: volt}, on: ["_time"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.i_ma * r.u_mv / 1000000.0}))

from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "input_current" and r._field == "value" and r.ina_channel_label == "VDD_IN") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "input_voltage" and r._field == "value" and r.ina_channel_label == "VDD_IN") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Power by Rail (W)
panels.description: Per-rail power = current × voltage for each INA3221 channel (VDD_IN = board total; VDD_SOC, VDD_CPU_GPU_CV, channel_4 are sub-rails). Joined per time window.

targets.query: cur = from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "input_current" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "ina_channel_label"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "i_ma"}) volt = from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "input_voltage" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "ina_channel_label"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "u_mv"}) join(tables: {c: cur, v: volt}, on: ["_time", "ina_channel_label"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, ina_channel_label: r.ina_channel_label, _value: r.i_ma * r.u_mv / 1000000.0})) |> group(columns: ["ina_channel_label"])

panels.title: Board Energy in View (J)
panels.description: VDD_IN board energy over the selected range = sum of 1 s-windowed board power (rectangle integral of real INA3221 samples, no modelling). 1 J = 1 W·s.

targets.query: cur = from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "input_current" and r._field == "value" and r.ina_channel_label == "VDD_IN") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "i_ma"}) volt = from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "input_voltage" and r._field == "value" and r.ina_channel_label == "VDD_IN") |> aggregateWindow(every: 1s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "u_mv"}) join(tables: {c: cur, v: volt}, on: ["_time"]) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.i_ma * r.u_mv / 1000000.0})) |> sum()

panels.title: Per-Drain Comms vs Storage Window (ms)
panels.description: recv_duration_ms = reception (comms) window; write_duration_ms = Parquet write (storage) window per drain. Integrate Board Input Power (panel above) over each window for Joules; tools/energy_capture.py reports the exact per-drain J (real INA3221 samples, no modelling).

targets.query: from(bucket: "alumet_energy") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "stm_mission" and r.source == "drain") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.shuttle_id =~ /${shuttle:regex}/ and r.kind =~ /${kind:regex}/) |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "shuttle_id", "kind"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value") |> keep(columns: ["_time", "shuttle_id", "kind", "recv_duration_ms", "write_duration_ms"]) |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 200)
